case_title: MOHAMMAD SADEGH SERAJI VS. ALSHUJAA NASSER HUSSEIN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERAJI, MOHAMMAD SADEGH ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2018 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY SERAJI, MOHAMMAD SADEGH HUSSEIN, ALSHUJAA NASSER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-26-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-26-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. 506 PLAINTIFF MOHAMMAD SERAJI IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED FARSI INTERPRETER MIRIAM FOUDEH #700164. DEFENDANT ALSHUJAA HUSSEIN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (IFP: $0.00) SERVED MAY-25-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUSSEIN, ALSHUJAA NASSER
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVER>) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERAJI, MOHAMMAD SADEGH AS TO DEFENDANT HUSSEIN, ALSHUJAA NASSER
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERAJI, MOHAMMAD SADEGH AS TO DEFENDANT HUSSEIN, ALSHUJAA NASSER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SERAJI, MOHAMMAD SADEGH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUSSEIN, ALSHUJAA NASSER $2,486.68 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,486.68, PLAINTIFF AND HIS WITNESS ESTABLISHED THAT DEFENDANT WAS AT FAULT FOR AN UNSAFE LANE CHANGE THAT CAUSED DAMAGE TO HIS CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HUSSEIN, ALSHUJAA NASSER
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,486.68 FILED BY SERAJI, MOHAMMAD SADEGH AS TO DEFENDANT HUSSEIN, ALSHUJAA NASSER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 6-17-18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
